channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Prep basketball: Catching up on holiday action, previewing upcoming Sabrina Ionescu showcase
item.description: Archbishop Riordan, Dougherty Valley, Salesian boys have success at assorted holiday tournaments, plus a peek ahead to Sabrina Ionescu's SI20 showcase and a Mitty-Ontario Christian rematch
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Gauff and Fritz put U.S. in United Cup tennis semis. Kazakhstan also through after ousting Germany
item.description: PERTH, Australia (AP) — Coco Gauff and Taylor Fritz powered the U.S., tournament winner two years ago, into the semifinals of the United Cup mixed teams tennis event on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jeanty falls short of record as dream season gets stuffed by Penn State defense in CFP loss
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Ashton Jeanty took the handoff on Boise State's first play and made it just a few steps before being greeted by a wall of dark blue Penn State jerseys that swallowed him up and shoved him backward for no gain.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Rangers putting goalie Igor Shesterkin on IR with an upper body injury, AP source says
item.description: New York Rangers goaltender Igor Shesterkin is going on injured reserve, according to a person with knowledge of the decision. The person spoke to The Associated Press on condition of anonymity Tuesday because the moved had not been announced. The person said Shesterkin has an upper-body injury.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lenny Randle, major leaguer repeatedly in the spotlight for 12 seasons, dies at 75
item.description: MURRIETA, Calif. (AP) — Lenny Randle, a big league player for 12 seasons who spoke five languages, performed stand-up comedy, was dubbed “The Most Interesting Man in Baseball” and was suspended for punching his Texas Rangers manager, has died. He was 75.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Saunders scores 30 as BYU wins Big 12 opener
item.description: PROVO, Utah (AP) - Richie Saunders scored a career-high 30 points and BYU cruised to a 76-56 victory over Arizona State on Tuesday in a Big 12 Conference opener.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Javon Small hits go-ahead FT with 1.8 seconds left, sending West Virginia to 62-61 win over No. 7 KU
item.description: LAWRENCE, Kan. (AP) — Javon Small hit the go-ahead free throw with 1.8 seconds remaining, and short-handed West Virginia held on after blowing an 18-point second-half lead to beat seventh-ranked Kansas 62-61 in an intense Big 12 opener for both teams Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lions, 49ers players get into scuffle during hotly contested game
item.description: Detroit Lions defensive back Kerby Joseph vowed to have his teammates' backs after getting into a scuffle with San Francisco 49ers wide receiver Jauan Jennings on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How the Chicago Blackhawks brought the St. Louis Blues to life
item.description: As the St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks gear up for the 2025 NHL Winter Classic, it's worth revisiting a fascinating piece of hockey history: The Blues franchise, as St. Louis knows it today, might not exist without a helping hand from their cross-state rival.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Roki Sasaki might visit 1 or 2 teams before deciding which club he wants to sign with
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Prized Japanese free agent Roki Sasaki may visit one or two teams before deciding which club he wants to sign with.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lakers trade former All-Star to Brooklyn
item.description: For the second time in his NBA career, D'Angelo Russell has been traded from the Los Angeles Lakers to the Brooklyn Nets.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: BYU crushes Colorado in Alamo Bowl, 36-14
item.description: SAN ANTONIO, Tex. (AP) - L.J. Martin rushed for 93 yards and two touchdowns, Jake Retzlaff passed for 151 yards, and No. 17 BYU beat 20th-ranked Colorado 36-14 in the Alamo Bowl on Saturday night. “Understanding that they have great players on the other side of the field," Martin said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
